subcodes.first_line: Praised be Thou, O Lord my God! Thou beholdest my perplexity, and the depth of mine anguish, and the agony of my soul
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری اضطرابی و همی و غمی و ابتلائی فو عزتک قلب البها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @humility; meekness; lowliness
